channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nayantara Roy’s 'The Magnificent Ruins': Family Secrets and Inheritance in Kolkata
item.description: Nayantara Roy’s novel, 'The Magnificent Ruins', is a sprawling family saga set in Kolkata that explores the complexities of inheritance, familial grudges, and romantic entanglements. The story follows...

item.title: Punjab introduces Rs50,000 fine for improper disposal of animal remains during Eid ul Adha cleanliness campaign
item.description: The Punjab government has announced strict measures to maintain cleanliness during Eid ul Adha, including a Rs50,000 fine for individuals found dumping animal remains and waste in streets, drains, res...

item.title: Ashmusy Explains Why She Chose to Freeze Her Eggs to Secure Future Motherhood
item.description: Content creator and social media influencer, Amarachi Amusi, popularly known as Ashmusy, don talk why she decide to freeze her eggs. For an interview with Punch, she yan say becoming mother na one imp...

item.title: More than a dozen fans removed from Essendon–Richmond match at the MCG over disruptive behaviour
item.description: More than a dozen spectators were removed from the Essendon–Richmond Australian Football League match at the Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG) after allegedly engaging in disruptive and offensive behavio...

item.title: A Look at 1990s Couples’ Fashion Trends: From Grunge to Minimalist Style

item.title: Two dairy farm workers found dead inside milk cooling tank in Eastern Cape
item.description: Two male farm workers were found dead inside a milk cooling tank on a dairy farm in Humansdorp, Eastern Cape, on Wednesday, prompting a major emergency response and an official police investigation. A...

item.title: Claudia Mori’s Career as Actress, Singer, and Entertainment Producer in Italy
item.description: Claudia Mori is a well-known Italian actress, singer, and entertainment producer who became a prominent figure in Italy’s cultural scene beginning in the 1960s. She first rose to fame as a film actres...

item.title: Government Encourages Private Investment in Modern Waste Management Solutions
item.description: The Tanzanian government has called upon private sector players to step up and invest in modern waste management technologies to help tackle the growing environmental challenges. Officials highlighted...

item.title: Pakistan enhances airport screening and preparedness following Ebola outbreak in Africa

item.title: Customers seek refunds after AVG Travels cancels China tour packages at short notice
item.description: Hundreds of Australian travellers were left stranded and seeking refunds after Melbourne-based company AVG Travels cancelled multiple China holiday packages at the last minute. Customers reported rece...

item.title: Putin threatens retaliation after deadly strike on Luhansk student dormitory
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin has vowed retaliation following a deadly attack on a student dormitory in occupied Luhansk, which Moscow claims killed six people and injured 39. Fifteen individuals r...

item.title: Overview of Proposed Social Media Regulation Bills in the Philippine Congress
item.description: In the 20th Congress of the Philippines (2025-2028), lawmakers are considering multiple bills to regulate social media platforms due to concerns about disinformation, child safety, and tech accountabi...

item.title: Child protection strategy in South Africa faces implementation and funding concerns

item.title: Cool and Unsettled Weekend Ahead with Rain and Storms in Eastern Regions
item.description: This weekend, South Africa will experience cool and unsettled weather across much of the country. A cold front is moving through, bringing showers and thunderstorms mainly to the central and eastern p...

item.title: Kiraitu Murungi Opens Up About Grief After Death of Daughter Anita Kendi

item.title: Palarong Pambansa 2026 Kicks Off in Agusan del Sur with Student-Athletes Competing Nationwide

item.title: Fatboy Slim headlines BBC Radio 1's Big Weekend with a dance-filled set
